name: Caramelized Apples with Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour sugar into a large skillet.
2. Heat over medium-low heat until the sugar begins to melt.
3. Continue heating and simmering until the syrup turns pale amber in color.
4. Swirl in butter and vanilla extract.
5. Add the apples, stirring to coat them with the caramel sauce.
6. Stir the syrup to dissolve any clumps of sugar.
7. Cover the skillet and cook over low heat until the apples release juices, about 5 minutes.
8. Uncover and continue cooking until the syrup thickens, basting the apples occasionally.
9. Let the apples cool slightly.
10. To serve, spoon the caramel apples into a dessert dish and top with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
